title: ranunculus dimidiatus
intro: Ranunculus dimidiatus, also known as the split-seed crowfoot, is a plant species belonging to the family Ranunculaceae, native to the western parts of North America. The medicinal properties of Ranunculus dimidiatus lie in its root, which has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including rheumatism and skin conditions. The health benefits associated with this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe irritated skin and reduce pain. Ranunculus dimidiatus can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, or salves, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
